texto: Charm is an elusive quality. Some have it; no teacher can afford to be without it. Teachers who lack charm must resort to violence.”“How much more dignified to retire from the world rather than wait for the world to tire of you.”“Reform, like gender, is a concept in constant need of reinvention.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Hugh Mahoney: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Charm is an elusive quality. Some have it; no teacher can afford to be without it. Teachers who l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, satire, charm pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
